scripts.icons: node scripts/render-icons.mjs && pnpm tauri icon src-tauri/icons/icon-1024.png && node scripts/render-icons.mjs
scripts.app:dev: pnpm build && pnpm tauri build --debug --bundles app && pnpm mac:icon && pkill -f OpenDesk.app; pnpm app:register; open src-tauri/target/debug/bundle/macos/OpenDesk.app
scripts.app:rebuild: pkill -f OpenDesk.app; pnpm build && pnpm tauri build --debug --bundles app && pnpm mac:icon && pnpm app:register && open src-tauri/target/debug/bundle/macos/OpenDesk.app
scripts.app:register: /System/Library/Frameworks/CoreServices.framework/Versions/A/Frameworks/LaunchServices.framework/Versions/A/Support/lsregister -f src-tauri/target/debug/bundle/macos/OpenDesk.app && killall usernoted 2>/dev/null; killall NotificationCenter 2>/dev/null; killall Dock 2>/dev/null; true
